info.name: Simple Books API
info.description: A complete Postman collection for testing and exploring the **Simple Books API** - a RESTful API for browsing books and managing orders. This collection doubles as both a reference guide and an end-to-end workflow test suite.

exec: pm.expect(pm.response.text(), 'Response body must not be empty')
const order = Array.isArray(response) ? response.find(o => o.id === orderId) : response;
pm.expect(order.id, 'Order ID must match "orderId" collection variable')
pm.expect(order.bookId, 'Book ID must match "bookId" collection varibale')

pm.test("Order details remain correct, but customer name has changed", () => {
pm.expect(response.id, 'Order ID must match "orderId" collection variable')
pm.expect(response.bookId, 'Book ID must match "bookId" collection variable')
pm.expect(response.customerName, 'Customer name must not match "customerName" collection variable')
